# Anix Lynch — AI/Data Engineer, Los Angeles (Full Context)

> Anix Lynch is an LA-based, self-taught AI and Data Engineer. Ex-VC turned engineer.
> 4 active sprint lanes: AI Data Engineer, GenAI/Agent, DevRel, n8n automation.
> Every project claim is traceable to a live deployed repo.

## Identity
- Name: Anix Lynch
- Location: Los Angeles, California, USA
- Email: anixlynch@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://gozeroshot.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/anix-lynch
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/anixlynch

## GCP Stack (live, verified 2026)
Batch ingestion: Python bigquery client → WRITE_TRUNCATE → 49,986 rows in raw_healthcare_data
Streaming ingestion: Pub/Sub topic encounter-events → push subscription → Cloud Run FastAPI → idempotent MERGE → BigQuery
Streaming path B: Pub/Sub topic healthcare-vitals-stream → BigQuery direct subscription (no Cloud Run)
Operational: Cloud Scheduler freshness-watchdog-cron (6h HTTP ping) · 7 Cloud Run services with live HTTPS URLs
Warehouse: BigQuery 4 datasets · 35+ tables · DAY-partitioned + clustered · dbt-bigquery adapter · Great Expectations
AI: Vertex AI + Gemini 2.5 Flash (grounded RAG, production) · Anthropic (Claude)
Maps: Google Maps Platform full suite (Places, Geocoding, Routes, Distance Matrix, Street View, Elevation)
Workspace: GAM across gozeroshot.dev + anixlynch.com — zero-browser Gmail/Drive/Calendar/Admin SDK automation

## AWS Stack (live, verified 2026)
mocktailverse-bedrock: AWS Bedrock (Claude via boto3) + LangChain + pgvector (PostgreSQL) RAG pipeline
healthcare-signal-platform (AWS slice): S3 Parquet landing zone + DynamoDB PAY_PER_REQUEST serving
3-cloud reconcile: GCP BigQuery + Microsoft Fabric OneLake + AWS S3/DynamoDB schema fingerprint verification (sha256)
Contract: openfda_fact_contract_v1.0.0.json · Account: 340752826866 · region us-east-1

## Azure / Microsoft Fabric Stack (live, verified 2026)
healthcare-da: Delta Lake → OneLake ingest · dbt-fabric adapter · TMDL semantic model in git
Power BI Direct Lake semantic model via Items API · DAX queries · MLflow experiment lineage
Azure AD · Azure Cosmos DB · FastAPI read layer

## Projects (GitHub: github.com/anix-lynch)

### healthcare-signal-platform
L1.5 flagship — anomaly detection + Vertex AI grounded RAG + multi-cloud portability
Stack: Python · FastAPI · Vertex AI · Gemini 2.5 · scikit-learn (K-Means) · NumPy · Weights & Biases · Langfuse · Cloud Run · Docker · AWS S3 · DynamoDB · Microsoft Fabric · 3-cloud reconcile

### healthcare-ai-data-engineer
L1 data engineering showcase — batch + streaming + warehouse + quality gates
Stack: Python · dbt · BigQuery (50k rows, partitioned + clustered) · Pub/Sub · Cloud Run (7 services) · Cloud Scheduler · Feast · FastAPI · Great Expectations · BM25 · Pandas · pytest · Docker · GitHub Actions

### mocktailverse-bedrock
AWS Bedrock RAG pipeline — enterprise GenAI data engineering
Stack: AWS Bedrock · pgvector · PostgreSQL · LangChain · RAG · boto3 · FastAPI · Docker

### healthcare-da
Microsoft Fabric analytics — dbt star schema + Power BI Direct Lake
Stack: Microsoft Fabric · Power BI · dbt · TMDL · DAX · MLflow · FastAPI · Python · Azure AD

### baymax
Closed-loop agent showroom — attention routing, safety brakes, outcome verification
Stack: Python · FastAPI · Claude API · Docker · GitHub Actions

### healthcare-genai-engineer
Hybrid retrieval RAG — BM25 + Sentence Transformers + RRF fusion
Stack: Python · FastAPI · BM25 · Sentence Transformers · RRF · Anthropic · OpenAI · Docker · pytest

### healthcare-forward-deployed-engineer
Customer-deployable triage assistant — VPC/on-prem deployment pattern
Stack: Python · FastAPI · Cloud Run · Docker · GitHub Actions · Epic FHIR (mock) · OAuth
